title: SB Counterexample + Im=1 Search at Depth 6
key_finding: SB (Im ≤ 0) IS violated at depth 6 via eml(real, complex_neg_re). Im values > 0 appear (range up to ~2.05 if any). BUT Im = 1 not found — closest is 0.999995. T_i (i not constructible) may still hold even though SB fails.
refined_conjecture: SB (Im ≤ 0) is FALSE. Refined Claim: Im(EML₁) never equals 1. This is weaker than SB but sufficient for T_i.
